entities.name: Validation Checklist
entities.context: Framework for verifying blocks before saving to ensure quality and correctness

entities.name: registry
entities.context: System that stores block-specific rules to be applied during validation

entities.name: transcript
entities.context: Source document from which content must be extracted (not invented)

entities.name: markdown
entities.context: Formatting structure (headers, bullets, tables) that must be preserved in blocks

entities.name: feedback checkbox
entities.context: UI element included when feedback_enabled flag is true

relationships.context: Checklist requires applying block-specific rules from the registry
Checklist verifies content originates from actual transcript
Checklist ensures markdown structure is preserved
Checkbox inclusion is one of the validation requirements
